stamp.title: Switzerland 5rp brown Sitting Helvetia (Strubel), imperf
stamp.summary: 1854 5rp brown 'Strubel' issue, Sitting Helvetia, imperforate. Labeled as Zumstein #13, priced at €2,50. Used with circular postmark.

stamp.title: Switzerland 5rp orange-red Sitting Helvetia (Strubel), imperf
stamp.summary: 1854 5rp orange-red 'Strubel' issue, Sitting Helvetia, imperforate. Labeled as Zumstein #15, priced at €5,-. Used with heavy black cancel.

stamp.title: Switzerland 2rp grey Sitting Helvetia, perforated
stamp.summary: 1862 2rp grey Sitting Helvetia, perforated. Labeled as Zumstein #20, priced at €0,30. Used with circular datestamp.

stamp.title: Switzerland 3rp black Sitting Helvetia, perforated
stamp.summary: 1862 3rp black Sitting Helvetia, perforated. Labeled as Zumstein #21, priced at €10,-. Used with circular datestamp.

stamp.title: Switzerland 3rp black Sitting Helvetia, perforated
stamp.summary: 1862 3rp black Sitting Helvetia, perforated. A second example, labeled as Zumstein #21, priced at €10,-. Used with circular datestamp.

stamp.title: Switzerland 40rp green Sitting Helvetia, perforated
stamp.summary: 1862 40rp green Sitting Helvetia, perforated. Labeled as Zumstein #26, priced at €4,-. Used with circular datestamp.

stamp.title: Switzerland 1fr gold Sitting Helvetia, perforated
stamp.summary: 1862 1fr gold Sitting Helvetia, perforated. Labeled as Zumstein #28, priced at €8,-. Used with circular datestamp.

stamp.title: Switzerland 2rp bistre-brown Sitting Helvetia, perforated
stamp.summary: 1867 2rp bistre-brown Sitting Helvetia, perforated. Labeled as Zumstein #29 B, priced at €15,-. Used with circular datestamp.

stamp.title: Switzerland 25c green Standing Helvetia
stamp.summary: 1882 25c green Standing Helvetia issue. Labeled as Zumstein #32, priced at €0,50. Used with circular datestamp.

stamp.title: Switzerland 30c blue Standing Helvetia
stamp.summary: 1882 30c blue Standing Helvetia issue. Part of a group labeled Zumstein #33 A+B, priced at €21,- for the pair. Used.

stamp.title: Switzerland 30c blue Standing Helvetia
stamp.summary: 1882 30c blue Standing Helvetia issue. Second stamp in the group labeled Zumstein #33 A+B. Used with circular datestamp.

stamp.title: Switzerland 30c blue Standing Helvetia
stamp.summary: 1882 30c blue Standing Helvetia issue. Labeled as Zumstein #33 B, priced at €20,-. Likely a rarer perforation or paper variety (perf 11.5). Used.
